data.title: The Faculty of Business Data Science of Kansai University and transcosmos sign a partnership agreement
data.description: Enhance practical data science education by fostering collaboration between universities and businesses. Drive advancement in education and academic research with a DX talent development program. Recently in Tokyo on March 30, 2026, the Faculty of Business Data Science at Kansai University in Osaka, Japan, announced the initiation of this program. This strategic initiative aims to boost the skills of individuals in data science by providing hands-on training and practical experience. This collaboration seeks to empower students and professionals in the field, enabling them to take on the challenges of the digital era. The program will benefit a large number of participants, contributing to the growth and development of data-driven industries.

data.title: Aker Horizons ASA (under liquidation): Liquidation balance sheet
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Oslo, Norway, it was announced that following an extraordinary general meeting on February 26, 2026, Aker Horizons ASA decided to initiate its liquidation process. The Board of Directors has commenced the necessary procedures in compliance with this resolution.

data.title: New Guide Helps Policymakers Safely Test Carbon Market Innovations
data.description: In Lagos, Nigeria, on March 30, 2026, the Clean Cooking Alliance (CCA) and the Voluntary Carbon Markets Integrity Initiative (VCMI) jointly unveiled a new comprehensive guide titled "Regulatory Sandbox to Support Carbon Markets." This global guide aims to assist regulators and policymakers in navigating the testing of carbon initiatives. The guide provides a step-by-step approach for implementing carbon regulations and policies. This collaboration presents a significant milestone in promoting sustainable practices, with a focus on reducing carbon footprints.

data.title: Tencent Cloud Partners with ComfyUI to Transform 3D Workflows in Open-Source AI
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 30, 2026, Tencent Cloud, the cloud division of Tencent, a global technology corporation, revealed its collaboration with ComfyUI, a leading free, open-source, node-based visual AI platform for generative content creation. This partnership signifies a significant move given ComfyUI's status as one of the most favored platforms globally.

data.title: Dogecoin Remains 'Stuck' After Top Analyst's 29% Move Prediction Fails To Play Out—But There's Still Hope
data.description: A prominent crypto expert predicted significant volatility for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), but as of Sunday, the meme-inspired cryptocurrency has not shown any major price movements. The analyst, Ali Martinez, pointed out a descending triangle pattern on Dogecoin's 4-hour chart, suggesting a potential 29% price swing. However, Dogecoin has not yet broken out of this pattern and remains stagnant within the triangle. Martinez did not specify whether the expected movement would be upwards or downwards. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: DeFi leader Aave introduces on OKX's Ethereum L2, X Layer, the 21st blockchain to join with Aave surpassing $1 trillion in lending volume.
data.description: A new development in the blockchain space reveals that OKX’s X Layer has become the 21st blockchain to incorporate Aave. This comes as Aave, a prominent decentralized finance platform, has achieved a significant milestone by exceeding $1 trillion in cumulative lending volume.

data.title: Senate Banking Committee to hold Fed chair nominee hearing in mid-April, likely by April 13. Senator Warren opposes appointment.
data.description: Around the middle of April, the Senate Banking Committee will hold a hearing for the nominee for the Federal Reserve chair position. Senator Elizabeth Warren has expressed opposition to the proposed appointment.
